implemented_changes.change: Added exact-name, payload-gated missing-unit inference for additional count, workforce, safety, complaint, money, percentage, ridership, and count-rate metric names. Rules only apply when the record has a finite numeric value and no existing unit or unit_normalized.
guards: Money metrics require visible money evidence such as dollar/currency text.
Percentage metrics require signed percent evidence or stored raw percent text.
Complaint count metrics require count-shaped payload evidence rather than percent-only rows.
No hand edits were made to canonical JSONL; canonical outputs were regenerated by deterministic materialize.

subagents.finding: Audited the next exact-name metric missing-unit slice and recommended a follow-on deterministic batch that could move missing unit-family 981 -> about 588 if implemented with the same gates.

remaining.next_high_confidence_lane: Implement the read-only audit's next exact-name metric batch, avoiding deferred ambiguous train-derailment/train-collision, crash-injury, broad-ridership, and Secondary Screening Score ontology choices.
